use_codes.desc: INCREASE TEAR PRODUCTION IN PATIENTS WITH KERATOCONJUNCTIVITIS SICCA (DRY EYE).

indications.text:
CEQUA ophthalmic solution is a calcineurin inhibitor immunosuppressant indicated to increase
tear production in patients with keratoconjunctivitis sicca (dry eye).

CEQUA ophthalmic solution is a calcineurin inhibitor immunosuppressant indicated to increase
